chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.D-1745 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 07-5-2025 Mr. Ghulam Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Shahiryar Imdad Awan, Assistant A.G -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
